response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in full-stack development, distributed systems, and leadership roles, but lacks direct experience with AI-first growth/experimentation systems, large-scale experimentation platforms, or AI-driven tooling. His background in telemetry and metrics is present but not clearly tied to experimentation frameworks. His hands-on coding and mentorship align well with the role's technical demands.
strengths: Strong distributed systems and low-latency app experience (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/sec)
Proven leadership in building scalable systems and mentoring engineers (e.g., Altom Consulting, GISCollective)
Diverse language proficiency (C, C++, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang) and production experience at scale
concerns: No explicit mention of experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or growth measurement frameworks
Limited evidence of AI tool integration or accelerating engineering velocity with AI (preferred qualification)
Recent roles focus on AI-agent infrastructure and direct mail automation, not directly aligned with growth/experimentation systems
